---
title: "open"
generated: true
description: "Morphological opening: [`dilate`](../nitrix-morphology/dilate.qmd) of [`erode`](../nitrix-morphology/erode.qmd) of `x`."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.morphology`](../nitrix-morphology.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.morphology._mm`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:open -->
```python
open(x: Num[Array, '... *spatial'], *, structuring_element: Optional[Num[Array, '*kspatial']] = None, size: Optional[Union[int, Sequence[int]]] = None, padding: str = 'SAME', backend: Backend = 'auto') -> Num[Array, '... *spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:open -->
Morphological opening: [`dilate`](../nitrix-morphology/dilate.qmd) of [`erode`](../nitrix-morphology/erode.qmd) of `x`.

Erosion followed by dilation with the same structuring element.  Removes
small bright structures while preserving the overall shape.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:open -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Num` | `...` √ó `*spatial` | ‚Äî | Single-channel input, `(..., *spatial)`. |
| `structuring_element` | `Optional[Num[Array, '*kspatial']]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Per-position offsets; shape `(*kspatial,)` matching the spatial rank of `x`. `None` selects a flat box of `size`. |
| `size` | `Optional[Union[int, Sequence[int]]]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Side length of a flat hyper-rectangular structuring element. An `int` is broadcast to all spatial dimensions. Ignored if `structuring_element` is provided. Default `3`. |
| `padding` | `str` | ‚Äî | `'SAME'` | `"SAME"` (default) or `"VALID"`, applied to both the erosion and dilation passes. |
| `backend` | `Backend` | ‚Äî | `'auto'` | `"auto"`, `"pallas-cuda"`, or `"jax"`; forwarded to both passes. |

**Returns** `Num` ‚Äî shape `...` √ó `*spatial`. Opened array of the same shape as `x` (for `padding="SAME"`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:open -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks ‚Äî nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **703.06 ms** (median, L4); up to **156.19√ó faster** than `scipy.ndimage.grey_opening`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_OPEN.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[128, 128, 128],se=ball,radius=2,batch=4,tier=large | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 3.29 ms / 3.33 ms | 212.98 ms | 33.55 MB (hbm) | n/a (no oracle) | 0.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[128, 128, 128],se=ball,radius=2,batch=4,tier=large | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 702.79 ms / 703.06 ms | 2.127 s | 8724.15 MB (hbm) | n/a (no oracle) | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256, 256],se=ball,radius=2,tier=large | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 4.49 ms / 4.57 ms | 266.81 ms | 67.11 MB (hbm) | n/a (no oracle) | 0.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256, 256],se=ball,radius=2,tier=large | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 1.396 s / 1.397 s | 3.345 s | 16995.32 MB (hbm) | n/a (no oracle) | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256, 256],se=ball,radius=4,tier=large | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 27.08 ms / 27.19 ms | 278.09 ms | 67.11 MB (hbm) | n/a (no oracle) | ‚Äî |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256, 256],se=ball,radius=4,tier=large | `nitrix-jax` | oom | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256, 256],se=box,size=3,tier=large | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 4.50 ms / 4.99 ms | 174.34 ms | 67.11 MB (hbm) | n/a (no oracle) | 3.91x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256, 256],se=box,size=3,tier=large | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 1.15 ms / 1.17 ms | 153.71 ms | 268.44 MB (hbm) | n/a (no oracle) | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cpu | shape=[256, 256],se=box,size=3 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| open | jax-cpu | shape=[256, 256],se=box,size=3 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 397.0 ¬µs / 422.3 ¬µs | 65.48 ms | 708 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cpu | shape=[256, 256],se=box,size=3 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 2.21 ms / 2.25 ms | 2.25 ms | 708 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 5.58x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256],se=box,size=3 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 221.2 ¬µs / 229.9 ¬µs | 237.44 ms | 0.26 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 2.23x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256],se=box,size=3 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 99.3 ¬µs / 101.2 ¬µs | 124.93 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256],se=box,size=3 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 2.23 ms / 2.25 ms | 2.28 ms | 0.26 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 22.40x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cpu | shape=[256, 256],se=disk,radius=3 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| open | jax-cpu | shape=[256, 256],se=disk,radius=3 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 12.33 ms / 17.53 ms | 184.96 ms | 708 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cpu | shape=[256, 256],se=disk,radius=3 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 2.73 ms / 2.89 ms | 2.81 ms | 708 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 0.22x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256],se=disk,radius=3 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 524.4 ¬µs / 531.6 ¬µs | 213.99 ms | 0.26 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 0.82x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256],se=disk,radius=3 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 638.2 ¬µs / 660.1 ¬µs | 897.95 ms | 93.06 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256],se=disk,radius=3 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 2.75 ms / 3.09 ms | 4.14 ms | 0.26 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 4.30x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cpu | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=ball,radius=2 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| open | jax-cpu | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=ball,radius=2 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 214.66 ms / 226.11 ms | 383.14 ms | 739 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cpu | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=ball,radius=2 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 12.13 ms / 12.31 ms | 27.81 ms | 708 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 0.06x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=ball,radius=2 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 563.0 ¬µs / 582.4 ¬µs | 200.98 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 0.09x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=ball,radius=2 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 6.00 ms / 6.11 ms | 870.53 ms | 336.59 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=ball,radius=2 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 12.09 ms / 12.31 ms | 12.14 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 2.02x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cpu | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=box,size=3 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| open | jax-cpu | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=box,size=3 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 4.04 ms / 4.43 ms | 79.15 ms | 708 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cpu | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=box,size=3 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 14.69 ms / 14.82 ms | 14.85 ms | 708 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 3.63x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=box,size=3 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 328.7 ¬µs / 349.4 ¬µs | 173.72 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 2.75x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=box,size=3 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 119.4 ¬µs / 121.1 ¬µs | 148.79 ms | 4.19 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| open | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=box,size=3 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_opening` | ok | 18.65 ms / 19.49 ms | 17.97 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 156.19x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `5066cd0f` ¬∑ nitrix `c31df7e1`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:open -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
